zh.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne是Count Geoffrey Of Rennes和Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy的兒子，於0996年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯。他於1025年與Berthe de Blois在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1040年10月7日在法國諾門迪奧內文迪爾斯享年44歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利費艾坎普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne是Count Geoffrey Of Rennes和Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy的儿子，于0996年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯。他于1025年与Berthe de Blois在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1040年10月7日在法国諾門迪奧內文迪爾斯享年44岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利費艾坎普。

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne was born in 0996, in Vannes, Morbihan, Brittany, France as the son of Count Geoffrey Of Rennes and Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy. He married Berthe de Blois in 1025, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 7 October 1040, in Vimoutiers, Orne, Normandy, France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne est né en 0996, à Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, fils de Count Geoffrey Of Rennes et Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy. Il a épousé Berthe de Blois en 1025, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1040, à Vimoutiers, Orne, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne wurde 0996 in Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich, als Sohn von Count Geoffrey Of Rennes und Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy geboren. Er hat 1025 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Berthe de Blois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1040 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Vimoutiers, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne è nato il nel 0996 nel Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia come figlio di Count Geoffrey Of Rennes e Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy. Lui sposato Berthe de Blois nel 1025, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 7 ottobre 1040, nel Vimoutiers, Orne, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagneは0996年にフランスブレタグンモービハンヴァンスでCount Geoffrey Of RennesとDuchess Hedwig Of Normandyの息子として生まれた。1025年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスでBerthe de Bloisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1040年10月7日にフランスノーマンディオルンヴィモウティエルズで44歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフeカンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne(은)는 0996년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 버네스에서 Count Geoffrey Of Rennes(와)과 Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1025년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 Berthe de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1040년 10월 7일 프랑스 노먼디 른 비모우티어스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 프e캠프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne nasceu em 0996, em Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, França filho de Count Geoffrey Of Rennes e Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy. Ele casou-se com Berthe de Blois em 1025, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1040, em Vimoutiers, Orne, Normandie, França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne родился в 0996 г. в местности ваннесь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. Его родителей звали Count Geoffrey Of Rennes и Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy. Он женился на женщине по имени Berthe de Blois в 1025 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 7 октября 1040 г. в местности вимоутиирс, орн, норманди, Франция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности фeкамп, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne nació en 0996, en Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia como hijo de Count Geoffrey Of Rennes y Duchess Hedwig Of Normandy. Se casó con Berthe de Blois en 1025, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1040, en Vimoutiers, Orne, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
